description: An agent evaluates a loan application for a high-risk customer.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve customer financial data and credit history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully collects detailed financial profile.

nodes.task_description: Call the risk scoring API for an automated assessment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains a risk score of 0.70.

nodes.task_description: Evaluate the risk score against the current policy threshold (0.85 for approval).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the loan as high-risk and rejects it.
